title: We Play No Games
author: Mathys Lefebvre
description: Welcome to WePlayNoGames podcast 🎙💥 A podcast series connecting the environmental and the sports industries. My name is Mathys Lefebvre, and I’m a French Student-Athlete at the University of Pittsburgh. Today, you will learn with me, from some of the most interesting sports organisations members, including athletes, and you will listen to amazing stories from activists fighting for the reduction of the impact we have on our planet. 🌍 Each episode of this podcast will want to create a deep and op
